prompt: 我想开发一个播客管理功能，用户可以订阅、管理和收听播客。请帮我分析这个需求并开始开发。

assertions.name: responds_in_chinese
assertions.description: Response is in Chinese matching user language
assertions.check: Response uses Chinese language for communication

assertions.name: prd_in_chinese
assertions.description: PRD content is in Chinese format
assertions.check: Response creates PRD with Chinese sections like 用户故事, 验收标准, 商业价值

assertions.name: pm_analysis_first
assertions.check: Response starts with 需求分析/产品分析, not code

assertions.name: mentions_bilingual_ui
assertions.check: Response includes bilingual UI/i18n requirements for technical implementation
